response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the retrieved record, availability result, and filtered list as distinct findings.
Use only the requested checks and do not expand the task to related records.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call fleet_get, fleet_availability, and fleet_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the fleet readiness brief, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: retrieve fle-220; check whether "Shuttle 30" is available on 2026-11-21 in Depot D; and list active vehicles in Depot D. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Limit tool use to these requested checks; do not inspect or update related records.
